title: Ex-minister Aroop Biswas’s brother held in alleged extortion in Tollygunge film industry
description: Swarup Biswas, the former president of the Federation of Cine Technicians & Workers of Eastern India (FCTWEI), was arrested based on an FIR lodged by the female make-up artist who accused him of blacklisting her for two years and asked for money and sexual favour to get work
